system.description:
Roll +Heart when you try to make someone hear you, through intimidation or conversation.

10+: They hear you and believe you.

7-9: Choose one: they need proof; they go along with it… for now; they do it but are terrified of you; you bribe them.

results.success: They hear you and believe you.
results.partial: Choose one: they need proof; they go along with it… for now; they do it but are terrified of you; you bribe them.
